items.title: Michigan Wolverines National Champs 2026 Basketball Icon T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: michigan, wolverines, national, champs, 2026, basketball, icon. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
